## 📝 Executive Summary

## Outokumpu S2P — Amber

**Overall score:** 0.37/1.00 | Forward risk: 0.37 | Historical slip: 0.37

The project is rated **Amber**. There are 60 Red tasks and 146 Yellow/Amber tasks
across the plan. 262 tasks are completed; 22 are currently in progress.

Monte Carlo simulation (n=10,000) gives **77%** probability of finishing by 2026-12-07. 
**Top drivers (model importance):** total_float_days, variance_sign_code, pct_complete.



**Risk concentration:** 52% of active risk tasks are primarily owned by 'abhilasha.s@zycus.com' (Area/Phase not populated in source data — clustered on Owner, Task Name).

**Week-on-week:** Status held at **Amber** (score: 0.37 → 0.37, → stable).

**Recommendation:** No Red tasks are currently on the critical path, but 60 Red tasks exist across the plan — monitor for critical path impact. Unblock the 3 on-hold task(s) this week.

> **Positive signal:** Completion rate nearly tripled in the second half of the project (current pace ~9.0 tasks/week). If this acceleration holds, the December deadline is achievable — but verify this reflects real delivery, not task re-baselining.
